Item Name: Colour Mill Aqua Blend Water-Based Food Coloring, 20 Milliliters Sage Bullet Point 1: For food products incompatible with oil and fat Bullet Point 2: Works with royal icing, macarons, jellies, fondant, meringue and beverages Bullet Point 3: No added sugar Bullet Point 4: Free of common allergens Bullet Point 5: Vegan Bullet Point 6: Kosher Bullet Point 7: Halal Product Description: Can we give you some Sage advice? With its subtle blue undertones, it's a must-have dusty green for on-trend bakes. Shop it in the Botanical Pack and never look back.

With oil, royal icing can spoil and macaroons can crack, so Colour Mill’s unique Aqua Blend pigments are your best friend for turning oil-and-fat-incompatible products into bold and brilliant bakes.

Using more drops will increase the intensity of color. Using less will create softer hues. Build the color slowly as you mix your batter to achieve your desired hue.

Before getting started, use the bottle lid to pop a hole in the seal and give the bottle a good shake. Colour Mill’s pigments pack a punch so take it slow when coloring, starting with just a few drops and mixing as you go. Tip: If you have time and for the best results, let your mixture sit overnight.
  • Vegan friendly
  • Halal suitable
  • Certified kosher by Australia Kosher (symbol on bottle label)
  • Products, facility & packing lines all free of the 14 common allergens celery, cereals containing gluten, crustaceans, eggs, fish, lupin, milk, mollusks, mustard, nuts, peanuts, sesame seeds, sulphur dioxide and soya

    Aqua Blend pigments cannot be used with oil- and fat-dispersible ingredients.

    Store in a cool dry place away from sunlight. Value: 0.68 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Specialty food coloring positioned as a premium product for professional and hobbyist bakers, emphasizing versatility for oil-incompatible applications like royal icing and macarons. The 20ml bottle size, combined with the brand’s reputation for high-quality, allergen-free pigments, suggests a mid-to-high price point targeting niche culinary and baking audiences. The wide mouth opening allows for easy filling and cleaning, while also being ice-cube compatible for those warmer days. The patented leakproof threaded lid provides peace of mind, preventing spills during your adventures. Additionally, the Hardshell Powder Coat finish helps maintain its appearance, ensuring it stays beautiful wherever life takes you. With every purchase of a MiiR water bottle, you contribute to nonprofit organizations that empower communities and support environmental health, making it a responsible choice.
